exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your education learning forward
items: Research and compile a list of 5-7 educational programs or institutions that align with your learning goals
Assess your current knowledge and skills by completing a self-evaluation or taking a diagnostic test in your field of interest
Create a detailed learning prerequisites checklist including required courses, certifications, or experience needed for your target program
Schedule and conduct informational interviews with 3 professionals working in your target field or recent graduates from your programs of interest
Identify and enroll in a foundational course or obtain a relevant textbook to start building core knowledge in your chosen field
Create a comprehensive study schedule template that includes daily learning blocks, review sessions, and milestone checkpoints
